prompt: Fix the NaN weight bug. The app is displaying 'nan' for weight values in the UI (see the screenshot in the issue). Investigate the weight data flow — how weights are stored, retrieved, and displayed. Find where the NaN is introduced (likely a missing/undefined value being parsed as a number) and fix it with proper defaults or validation. Make sure to test your fix. The app is at https://patflynn.github.io/build/
